raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-E-002] interface.f90:3 <-> header.h:2  struct particle
  FIELD_ORDER: Field[0] Fortran='mass'(REAL(c_double)), C='charge'(double).
               Field[1] Fortran='charge'(REAL(c_double)), C='mass'(double).
  Types are compatible but order is swapped. Mass/charge values will be
  exchanged. Silent wrong-answer bug in physics simulations.

NOTE: Fortran field NAMES are irrelevant per Fortran 2003 §15.3.4.
      Field positions and types must match positionally.
